title: N'dian
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=N'dian |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[N'dian system/Legends|N'dian system]] *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[N'dian system/Legends|N'dian system]] in grid square R-6. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' depicts territory falling in that grid square as being located in either the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] region ([[spinward]] from the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]]) or [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] ([[trailing]] from the Perlemian). Since the Online Companion also places the system within the [[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja sector]], which is located spinward from the Perlemian, according to {{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}, it therefore must also be part of the Trans-Hydian. |sector=[[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja sector]] |system=[[N'dian system/Legends|N'dian system]] |coordinates=R-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Unidentified city (N'dian)|City]]{{CSWECite|II|364|N'dian}} |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|You ever carried out an assault on an urban objective before?''"
"''Yes. N'dian. Heard of it?''"
"''I meant one where you had to leave the place pretty well intact, sir.|Sev and Ordo|''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''}} '''N'dian''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[N'dian system/Legends|N'dian system]], a part of the [[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja sector]] within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] regions. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was the site of several [[City/Legends|urban centers]]. A [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] group was believed to be hiding in [[Unidentified city (N'dian)|one]] of the cities during that conflict. As a result, during the first [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the war, [[Ordo Skirata|Ordo]], a [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], was sent to the planet to [[Battle of N'dian|assault]] the city. The ensuing battle was highly intense, with Ordo almost completely destroying the city single-handedly in order to achieve his mission objectives. During a [[Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)|counterterrorism operation]] on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', which include the [[Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)|counterterrorism operation]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Ordo discussed his mission to N'dian with the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Sev/Legends|Sev]]. ==Behind the scenes== N'dian was first mentioned in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', written by [[Karen Traviss]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the N'dian [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet N'dian, within grid square R-6. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Spadja sector locations]]
